mechanism_narrative: Declines in the federal funds rate directly lower the discount rate for equity valuations, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Rank IC falls below 0.02 over a 3-year rolling window or forward returns are not significantly positive during rate cuts.

mechanism_narrative: When the unemployment rate crosses above 5.0 percent, labor market slack triggers recession fears that immediately depress equity valuations over the following month.
failure_condition: S&P 500 produces positive 20-day returns in more than 55 percent of instances where UNRATE exceeds 5.0 percent.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous expansion in retail sales and housing starts signals broad consumer demand strength that sustains corporate earnings growth and drives positive equity returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: Joint positive growth in RSAFS and HOUST fails to produce positive 60-day forward returns in at least 60 percent of observed cases.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating industrial production during a late-cycle expansion phase indicates capacity constraints and impending monetary tightening, causing immediate negative equity returns over the next week.
failure_condition: INDPRO acceleration in late-cycle regimes yields positive 5-day forward returns in more than 50 percent of cases.

mechanism_narrative: Monthly CPI inflation exceeding 3.0 percent forces markets to price in aggressive central bank tightening, which compresses equity multiples and generates negative forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Forward 20-day returns remain positive in over 60 percent of months where CPIAUCSL surpasses the 3.0 percent threshold.

mechanism_narrative: Steady growth in total nonfarm payrolls reflects robust economic activity and wage growth that supports corporate revenue expansion, producing positive S&P 500 returns over the following month.
failure_condition: PAYEMS growth fails to correlate with positive 20-day forward returns, yielding a Rank IC below 0.01 over a 5-year sample.

mechanism_narrative: Divergence between falling real GDP growth and rising retail sales indicates inventory drawdowns and unsustainable consumption, triggering a quarterly equity correction over the next 60 days.
failure_condition: The GDPC1-RSAFS divergence signal produces positive 60-day returns in more than 55 percent of triggered quarters.

mechanism_narrative: Declining industrial production during a post-shock recovery phase signals persistent supply chain bottlenecks that delay earnings rebounds, causing immediate negative equity returns over the next week.
failure_condition: INDPRO declines in post-shock recovery regimes yield positive 5-day forward returns in over 60 percent of observations.
